meanings.definition: rub with a brush, or as if with a brush
examples: Johnson brushed the hairs from his jacket
She brushed the suit before hanging it back into the closet
Her long skirt brushed the floor
A gasp swept cross the audience

meanings.definition: remove with or as if with a brush
examples: brush the dust from the jacket
brush the bread with melted butter

meanings.definition: touched lightly in passing; grazed against
examples: of all the people brushed against in a normal day on a city street I remember not a one

meanings.definition: (of hair or clothing) groomed with a brush
examples: the freshly brushed clothes hung in the closet

meanings.definition: (of fabrics) having soft nap produced by brushing
